text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: Trainer, I managed to finish first.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
The moment I crossed the finish line, with all the
cheers washing over me... The sense of
accomplishment was utterly indescribable.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
And I've no doubt in my mind that it's thanks to
your support I was able to enjoy such an
experience, Trainer. Thank you, from the bottom
of my heart.
choice_data_list: You shone like a star out there!

Don't get too complacent. Let's set our sights
on the next race!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Hehe! I'm quite confident that my running today
will live on in the hearts and minds of those who
came to watch.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Thank you. I shall strive to fill your memory with
many more great races, Trainer.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Yes. I very much wish to experience the sensation
of crossing that finish line in first again.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Please continue to provide me with your guidance
and support.
